title: bolbitis gaboonensis
intro: Bolbitis gaboonensis, also known as the Gaboon water fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae, native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Bolbitis gaboonensis include treating fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as being used as a treatment for respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions or decoctions, and may also be used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
